item.title: [Expert consensus on laboratory diagnosis of inflammatory bowel disease (2026)].
item.description: Zhonghua yu fang yi xue za zhi [Chinese journal of preventive medicine] - In recent years, the incidence of inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) in China has shown a significant upward trend. The invasive nature of colonoscopy limits its widespread application in population ...

item.title: Clinical Practice Guideline for the Surgical Management of Ulcerative Colitis.
item.description: Diseases of the colon and rectum -

item.title: Comment on: Vaccination recommendations and adherence in Inflammatory Bowel Disease: a physician-patient discordance study: There is still room for improvement.
